pages.text: $(l)Identity$()$(br2)The Assimilated Dweller is a parasite-twisted version of the classic cave dweller idea.$(br2)$(l)Impression$()$(br2)It feels infected, wrong, and more hostile than a normal stalker.

pages.title: Behavior
pages.text: $(l)Presence$()$(br2)It hunts like a creature that has lost itself to something worse.$(br2)$(l)Fear Style$()$(br2)Its horror comes from parasite imagery and the feeling of being overwhelmed.
